title: So do all Angels have a core
display_title: So do all Angels have a core
wikitext:
[]: So, do all Angels have a core?             Quote Post by flatulant » Wed Jan 03, 2007 2:15 pm I mean, for most angels it's easy to see. But what about Angels like Iruel or Armisael? Do they have cores?

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Wed Jan 03, 2007 2:30 pm All Adam dirived Angels have a core. It contains their souls.

[]:             Quote Post by flatulant » Wed Jan 03, 2007 2:45 pm But where would Iruel keep her core? How about Armisael?

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Wed Jan 03, 2007 2:48 pm They have internal cores. You never see Ramiel's but it's mentioned in the attack plan. ep #06 wrote: RITSUKO: This is because Shinji has a higher sync ratio with Unit 01, and this operation will require exceptional precision. Since the positron beam will be influenced by the Earth's gravity, magnetic fields and rotation, it will not fire in a straight line. You must remember to make adjustments for these deviations. You must penetrate the core precisely .

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Wed Jan 03, 2007 2:49 pm flatulant wrote: But where would Iruel keep her core?

[]:             Quote Post by flatulant » Wed Jan 03, 2007 2:50 pm Ah, okay. I have to fix Wikipedia then. BTW, where did you get that shirt from?

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Wed Jan 03, 2007 2:54 pm I shall now proceed to complain about the obsession with designating all non-lilims as female the Evangelion fandom seems to have.

[]:             Quote Post by flatulant » Wed Jan 03, 2007 2:57 pm MaggotMaster wrote: I shall now proceed to complain about the obsession with designating all non-lilims as female the Evangelion fandom seems to have.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Jan 03, 2007 3:03 pm MaggotMaster wrote: I shall now proceed to complain about the obsession with designating all non-lilims as female the Evangelion fandom seems to have.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Wed Jan 03, 2007 3:06 pm flatulant wrote: BTW, where did you get that shirt from?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Jan 03, 2007 4:09 pm fatulant wrote: So, do all Angles have a core?

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Wed Jan 03, 2007 4:13 pm flatulant wrote: http://www.evacommentary.org/appendix/geektionary_gender.html Adam ♀ Lilith ♀ Sachiel ♂ Shamshel ♀ Ramiel ♀ Gaghiel ♂ Israfel ♀ ♂ Sandalphon ♂ Matarael ♂ Sahaquiel ♀ Ireul ♀ Leliel ♀ Bardiel ♂ Zeruel ♂ Arael ♀ Armisael ♀ Tabris ♂

[]:             Quote Post by flatulant » Wed Jan 03, 2007 4:17 pm Trigger's Elysium wrote: flatulant wrote: http://www.evacommentary.org/appendix/geektionary_gender.html Adam ? Lilith ? Sachiel ? Shamshel ? Ramiel ? Gaghiel ? Israfel ? ? Sandalphon ? Matarael ? Sahaquiel ? Ireul ? Leliel ? Bardiel ? Zeruel ? Arael ? Armisael ? Tabris ?

[]:             Quote Post by flatulant » Wed Jan 03, 2007 4:18 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: fatulant wrote: So, do all Angles have a core?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jan 03, 2007 4:47 pm MaggotMaster wrote: I shall now proceed to complain about the obsession with designating all non-lilims as female the Evangelion fandom seems to have.

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Wed Jan 03, 2007 5:44 pm Trigger's Elysium wrote: What the FUCK. How is a giant floating penis supposed to be female?

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Wed Jan 03, 2007 6:38 pm flatulant wrote: MaggotMaster wrote: I shall now proceed to complain about the obsession with designating all non-lilims as female the Evangelion fandom seems to have.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Wed Jan 03, 2007 9:55 pm yeah the whole..."Kaworu is a chick" thing just is never work in my mind

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Wed Jan 03, 2007 11:51 pm MaggotMaster wrote: (how can a two-dimensional creature that contains another universe and has a 3 dimensional shadow have a gender?)

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Thu Jan 04, 2007 11:42 am felineki wrote: MaggotMaster wrote: (how can a two-dimensional creature that contains another universe and has a 3 dimensional shadow have a gender?)
